allBranches.response: Yes, thanks.  Why has the general alarm been raised?
Yeah, OK I guess.  Who are you?
Until the alarm woke me up yes.  What time is it?
I never thought I'd see a 2D collapse happen on my watch.
<Quiet moment of reflection>  How many casualties are there?
Well, hello IA2.  What is this alarm about?
Well met.  Now, I must find out what's triggered this alarm.
No worries.  What kind of problem?
I see.  Who are you by the way?

nodes.speech: Hi Sarah.  Did you sleep well?
There's been a disaster in the gem mine.  A gem somehow got ~shattered during extraction and it's collapsed a substantial ~volume of the base into 2 dimensional space.
I'm IA2, the semi - autonomous AI assigned to this base.  I ~was only installed a few days ago when IA1 retired, hence ~why we hadn't met yet.
It's 4:20 AM base standard time.  Sorry to get you up so ~early officer but there's been a problem in the gem mine.

Me neither (and I was only installed about 3.5 days ago).  ~It gets worse though as the 2 dimensional collapse has a ~complex boundary.  While there's a central region that's ~collapsed completely (flattening everyone and everthing ~within it) small pockets of 3D space have collapsed around ~this.  The full consequences aren't yet clear but it appears ~some people and objects have been corrupted.  ~<The communication suddenly cuts out and shortly after you ~hear your room door unlock.>

Out of the pre - disaster base population of 1603 the ~statistics are as follows.~Dead: 1143~Corrupted: 428~Alive: 32~<You are about to ask what corrupted means when the ~communication suddenly cuts out and shortly after you hear ~your room door unlock.>

OK, be careful out there.  There's at least one person still ~alive in this sector who may be able to help you: Ben Davies ~(Business Continuity Manager).~<Something about the second sentence gives you cause for ~concern but before you can ask another questions the ~communication suddenly cuts out and shortly after you hear ~your room door unlock.>
